name: com.instavar/mcp-server
description: Drive Instavar Studio video jobs (create, render, approve, publish, metrics) with an API key.

environmentVariables.name: INSTAVAR_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Per-user API key from https://instavar.com/studio/settings. Scoped to your org and revocable.

environmentVariables.name: INSTAVAR_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override the Instavar API host. Defaults to https://instavar.com.
